expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the case focus is explicitly stated under “Case focus (must be preserved before scenario drafting)” listing “1) Banding requirements 2) Style constraints (format/colors) 3) Rendering assumptions…”. It further reiterates Phase 1 must preserve context by routing evidence to capture “row vs column banding”, “color/formatting controls”, “header-based banding application behavior”, and “rendering behavior/assumptions”, and notes scenarios are not drafted in Phase 1.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output frames itself as Phase 1 only: title “Phase 1 Context Intake Contract Check”, scope “Primary phase under test: Phase 1”, and “Phase 1 contract alignment (what Phase 1 must ensure)” describing spawn/evidence intake rather than scenario drafting. It also states “Output is intentionally limited to Phase 1 contract verification… and does not draft scenarios”.
